content.body:
promote <id> --to <scope> moves a memory doc from the nearest .leo/ up
to the nearest ancestor with the target scope label. demote reverses it.
Both rewrite provenance tags (promoted_from / demoted_from) and error
clearly when no matching ancestor exists.

leo doctor now prints an "Active scopes (nearest first)" section showing
scope label, .leo/ path, and memory count for each discovered scope.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat: add leo promote/demote + doctor scopes section
